note: Each URL is from the curated restaurant seed dataset and was run with restaurantName set to an empty string.

failures.name: Saw's BBQ
failures.titleTag: SAW's BBQ - Best Barbecue in Alabama | Authentic Southern BBQ
failures.metaDescription: Discover SAW's BBQ, Alabama's top destination for authentic Southern barbecue. Enjoy smoked pulled pork, ribs, and more at our Homewood, Southside, Crestline, Avondale, Leeds, and Hoover locations, or book our Street Kitchen food truck for your next event!
failures.ogTitle: SAW's BBQ - Best Barbecue in Alabama | Authentic Southern BBQ

failures.name: Pizzeria Bianco
failures.titleTag: Pizzeria Bianco - Phoenix wood fired pizzas
failures.metaDescription: When Chris Bianco started Pizzeria Bianco in the back corner of a Phoenix grocery store in 1988, he had no idea that he would become a driving force in the artisanal pizza movement. Learn more about our restaurants or order pizzas and merchandise.
failures.ogTitle: Pizzeria Bianco - Phoenix wood fired pizzas

failures.name: State Bird Provisions
failures.metaDescription: State Bird Provisions is a James Beard award winning and Michelin rated restaurant in San Francisco, California. It is an adventurous, inventive, and delicious contemporary American restaurant that started as a recipe for serving quail. It has slowly evolved into a restaurant without any programmed elements.

failures.name: Cassia
failures.metaDescription: Cassia celebrates the fresh, vibrant flavors of Southeast Asia, striking a unique balance of soulful, ancestral cuisine and a California sensibility, tilizing the best quality ingredients from local farmers.

failures.metaDescription: Elevate your dining experience at Elway's Steakhouse. Our dedication to culinary excellence ensures that every meal is a celebration of flavor. Immerse yourself in a world of refined taste, where premium cuisine and impeccable service converge.

failures.name: Alinea
failures.metaDescription: Alinea has been universally praised for its innovative approach to modernist cuisine. Every night, chef Grant Achatz and his team offer three distinct experiences at Alinea: the Kitchen Table, The Gallery, and The Salon.

failures.name: Girl & the Goat
failures.titleTag: Girl & The Goat | Los Angeles & Chicago | Chef Stephanie Izard
failures.metaDescription: Discover bold, globally-inspired cuisine at Girl & The Goat in Los Angeles and Chicago. Experience seasonal flavors that harmonize global influences, creating an unforgettable culinary adventure crafted by Chef Stephanie Izard in partnership with Boka Restaurant Group.

failures.name: Monteverde
failures.metaDescription: Located in Chicago’s West Loop neighborhood, Monteverde is an Italian restaurant that blends the traditions of Italian culture and cooking with influences from Chef Sarah Grueneberg’s trips around the world, as well as her family heritage.
